name: visual-brainstorm
description: SVG-based visual brainstorming beside Claude Code — replies as interactive visual surveys, not text.

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/protocol && npm run build -w apps/studio && npm run build -w apps/mcp
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run smoke && npm run smoke:ui && npm run test:human && npm run test:human:archived
